description: Setup development environment, project structure, and core infrastructure

title: Design database schema for window film products
description: Create models: Product, Category, Brand, FilmType (ceramic, carbon, metallic), Specifications (VLT, UV rejection, heat rejection), CarModel compatibility
close_reason: Created FastAPI project with SQLite, SQLAlchemy models for products, categories, brands, quotes

title: Add email notification service for contact/quote form submissions
description: app/services/ is missing email_service.py. This is needed for (1) contact form submission notifications to admin and (2) quote request acknowledgements to customers. Should integrate with SMTP or SendGrid. Required before contact form API (autofilm-website-b3n) can be considered complete.
close_reason: Contact API (POST /contact) and quote API (POST /quotes) now fire email notifications via BackgroundTasks. Email service uses stdlib smtplib via run_in_executor — zero extra deps. Gracefully no-ops when EMAIL_HOST is empty (safe for dev). Settings updated with EMAIL_* and SITE_URL vars.

title: Reload Nginx after production deploy

close_reason: All components implemented: CategoryGrid, FeaturedProducts, ProductGrid, ProductFilters, SpecsTable, ImageGallery, QuoteForm, ContactForm. Also fixed ProductProductCard -> ProductCard naming issue across all pages.

title: Fix existing backend Ruff violations

title: Migrate database from SQLite to PostgreSQL + setup Alembic migrations
description: Backend currently uses SQLite (autofilm.db) but PROJECT_SPEC calls for PostgreSQL 15+. Need to: (1) update database.py connection string, (2) set up Alembic with alembic init and initial migration, (3) update docker-compose.yml with postgres service, (4) update .env example. This blocks Docker dev env task.

close_reason: Done: About Us page (gioi-thieu.vue) with hero, stats, values, team, timeline. Admin posts page with CRUD modal, publish toggle, delete confirm. Backend admin_posts.py with list/create/update/delete endpoints, wired into router.
